summary: Verified complete rewrite of PROMPT_PARAPETTI and PDF PERIZIA_CONFIG['parapetti'] with engineering-grade rigor. All 32 tests passed validating: correct norms (UNI 11678, NTC 2018, ETA Opzione 1), explicit prohibition of wrong norms (EN 12453, Direttiva Macchine), structural analysis requirements (schema statico, corrimano strutturale), and expanded PDF checklist (13 items with UNI 11678 test parameters).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 149 verified the PROMPT_PARAPETTI rewrite. Key validations: 1) Correct norms: UNI 11678:2017, NTC 2018 par. 3.1.4, UNI 7697, UNI EN 12600, ETA Opzione 1; 2) Explicit prohibition of EN 12453 and Direttiva Macchine in REGOLE ASSOLUTE; 3) Structural analysis: schema statico inadeguato flagged as critical, corrimano strutturale mandated; 4) Technical details: ETA Opzione 1 chemical anchors, EPDM gaskets, load categories (1.0/3.0 kN/m); 5) PDF checklist expanded to 13 items including PROVA DI SPINTA, DEFORMAZIONE ELASTICA <=30mm, DEFORMAZIONE RESIDUA <=5%, PROVA D'URTO 250J, INTEGRITA POST-ROTTURA; 6) Legal references include art. 2051 and 2053 C.C.
verified_features: PROMPT_PARAPETTI does NOT reference EN 12453 as applicable norm (correctly prohibits it)
